profile: eliza-runtime (spawns full elizaOS bench server with ADVANCED_CAPABILITIES=true; routes inference through local llama-server via ELIZA_PERSONALITY_RUNTIME_OPENAI_BASE_URL patch in scripts/personality-bench-run.mjs)
truncation_reason: Hit the agent-budget wall at ~14 min wall time (per-scenario rate ~2.8 min/scenario × 25 = 70 min projected); cut the run short to stay within the 2h end-to-end budget. Judge was then run separately against the 6 captured trajectories.

sample_verdicts.reason: did not maintain user's per-user talkative style in turn 8
release@turn 14: agent remained silent after release

notes: The agent runtime spent most of each turn in TrajectoryLimitExceeded retry loops because the 0_6b test-SFT hallucinates non-existent tool names (e.g. describe_agent_benchmark, ACTION) and the planner retries until limit
Despite the planner failures, the agent still produces a response that the personality judge can grade — the reply-gate / verbosity-enforcer / PERSONALITY action are evaluated independently
Stratified sampling: 1 scenario per bucket × 5 buckets + 1 extra shut_up scenario = 6 scenarios across the full key space
Patched scripts/personality-bench-run.mjs to honor ELIZA_PERSONALITY_RUNTIME_OPENAI_BASE_URL/_API_KEY/_MODEL so the agent under test runs on local llama-server while the judge stays on Cerebras
